nasb.text: Now Barzillai the Gileadite had come down from Rogelim; and he went on to the Jordan with the king to escort him over the Jordan.

esv.text: Now Barzillai the Gileadite had come down from Rogelim, and he went on with the king to the Jordan, to escort him over the Jordan.

cnv.text: 基列人巴西萊也從羅基琳下來，與王一同過約旦河，要在約旦河邊給王送行。

ccb.text: 基列人巴西莱也从罗基琳下来护送王过约旦河，然后送王上路。
